visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with black-rimmed glasses and a blue newsboy cap sits at a wooden table in a brightly lit studio. He wears a grey t-shirt and holds a white smartphone box. His hands are visible, showing a wooden bead bracelet on his right wrist and a yellow-strapped smartwatch on his left. (2) The scene cuts to a close-up of a light green iPhone 17 held against a background of lush green garden plants. The phone's surface reflects the soft natural light. No people are visible in this specific cut, only the device and the organic textures of the background. (3) Returning to the indoor setting, the man unboxes the phone. He points to the dual-lens camera setup on the back of the sage green device. The camera lenses are large and vertically aligned. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the matte finish of the phone. (4) A series of sample images are displayed. First, a small white and blue cat figurine on a mug. Then, several shots of a blue glass skyscraper under a bright sunny sky with green trees in the foreground. Finally, a close-up selfie of a woman with long hair smiling at night with city lights blurred in the background. (5) Back at the table, the man holds a dark green protective case. He carefully snaps it onto the light green phone. The background remains a neutral, slightly off-white wall. He then brings a matching green leather card wallet close to the phone to demonstrate the magnetic attachment. (6) The man holds the phone with the case and wallet attached. He looks directly at the camera with a satisfied smile. The final shot is a medium close-up focusing on his cheerful expression and the completed look of the accessorized mobile device.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the product, 1 female appearing in a sample photo montage.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged man, grey t-shirt with Roots Canada logo, blue newsboy cap, black-rimmed glasses, wooden bead bracelet, and yellow smartwatch.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Primary setting is a clean indoor studio with a wooden table and off-white wall. Secondary settings include a garden with greenery and outdoor urban views featuring the Taipei 101 building.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male speaker begins with a high-pitched, enthusiastic greeting at a fast pace. In the background, a mid-tempo electronic pop track with a strong, clean beat plays. The acoustic environment is studio-clean with no audible background noise. (2) As the phone is unboxed, a sharp 'whoosh' sound effect marks the transition. The speaker maintains high vocal arousal, emphasizing '4800 million pixels' with clear enunciation while the BGM continues steadily. (3) During the photo sample sequence, loud mechanical camera shutter clicks are synchronized with each visual cut. The speaker's pitch varies as he describes the 'ultra-wide angle' and front camera specs. No ambient interference is detected. (4) A bright, digital 'ding' sound effect triggers as text features appear on screen. The speaker's tone becomes more animated discussing the 'A19 processor.' The BGM synth melody remains audible but never masks the clear vocals. (5) When accessories are demonstrated, a twinkling 'sparkle' sound effect is used for emphasis. The speaker's intensity remains consistent throughout the presentation with continuous speech-music overlap. (6) The audio concludes with a final energetic phrase and a soft 'ting' sound effect as the music fades. The master track exhibits high fidelity and dynamic range, ending on a positive, authoritative note.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Introduction -> Feature Showcase -> Camera Samples -> Ecosystem Accessories -> Final Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide an enthusiastic unboxing and first-look review of the iPhone 17 in Sage Green, detailing its upgraded camera, processor, and display specs for a tech-focused audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator unboxes the device, details technical specifications, and showcases the brand logo and ecosystem accessories.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-production value tech review tailored for social media with rapid cuts, synchronized SFX, and high text density.
